'''Dreel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the [[Hand of Thrawn]] fortress on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. He was part of the effort to get [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] there in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
